name: Qwen2-VL-72B
archDisplay: Dense transformer + 675M-param ViT vision encoder (GQA, M-ROPE, dynamic resolution)
note: Gen-2 VLM flagship with dynamic-resolution ViT and M-ROPE for long video; benchmark scores below are for the -Instruct checkpoint.
tpsNote: ~48GB Q4 weights exceed a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM; requires multi-GPU or CPU offload.
verificationNotes: Real model, confirmed via live fetch of the Qwen2-VL-72B-Instruct HF README benchmark table: MMMU val 64.5, DocVQA test 96.5, MathVista testmini 70.5 all match exactly. Corrected the DocVQA row's notes from 'DocVQA val' to 'DocVQA test' since the actual table reports the test split, not val (score itself was already correct). ViT vision encoder corrected from '~600M' to '675M' (confirmed exact figure via search). paramsB 73.4B confirmed via llm-stats.com. ctxK 32 (32,768) confirmed via live config.json fetch. Release date 2024-09-19 confirmed (arXiv paper submitted 2024-09-18, HF instruct checkpoint + quantized versions available 2024-09-19; broader Qwen2-VL 2B/7B series announced 2024-08-29). License tongyi-qianwen confirmed on HF and llm-stats.com.
